RECLASSIFY DEFECT-S007-001 prod-failure -> pipeline_failure (test-isolation/infra class, §5a). EVIDENCE /aws/lambda/oxo-ws-auth-fn run 27098875856 window 16:57:30-16:59:45Z single runner IP 52.161.178.103: 17 Allow + 2 code-not-found, then RATE_LIMIT Deny from count=20 (16:58:28Z) monotonically to count=35 (16:59:24Z), 16 consecutive denies, NEVER resets in-window. CAUSE: authorizer per-IP budget (CONNECT_RATE_THRESHOLD=20/5min, oxo-connect-attempts DDB) is a SEPARATE control from the WAF CloudFront rate rule; IMP-008 runner-IP exclusion covers ONLY the WAF layer (oxo-test-runner-ips IP-set, CLOUDFRONT scope) — it does NOT touch the authorizer DDB budget. WAF fix unmasked the next-tighter control. 50-test serial suite + retries:2 consumes >19 connects inside one 5-min window; once count=20 the rest of the run is denied -> guest never pairs -> pairBrowsers 8s timeout in F3/S2 S1a T4/F4. NOT behavioural (no Allow-then-hang; the 3 specs assert correct server rejection and would pass with a connect). Prod users NOT impacted (single CI IP burned its own window; control worked as designed).

DIAGNOSED + CLASSIFIED, fix BLOCKED on architect ruling (§5a: must widen a grant OR change control semantics -> STOP, do not unilaterally change a prod security control). Class: pipeline_failure / test-isolation-infra; prod healthy. Durable fix = extend IMP-008 runner-IP exemption from the WAF layer (already done) to the authorizer per-IP layer (the next-tighter control it missed). Of the §5a option-(a) variants: env-CIDR-from-CDK-context is RULED OUT (runner IP is per-run/ephemeral, discovered at job start; a deploy-time-baked CIDR cannot track it and would be a standing bypass). Only WORKING fix = per-run self-cleaning DDB exemption item (written/removed by scripts/waf-runner-ip.js alongside the WAF IP-set entry, mirroring IMP-008), which requires the authorizer to GetItem a scoped exemption resource -> a NEW narrow grant that the s005-h2 security note (dynamodb-connectattempts.md / lambda-authorizer.md CP-H2-B) explicitly forbids ('No GetItem beyond what the increment needs'). Option (b) raise-threshold REJECTED (weakens control globally, dishonest). Option (c) suite serial/share-pairings REJECTED as durable fix: suite is ALREADY EXP-009-serialised+ordered and STILL exhausts — a 50-test run + retries:2 cannot fit in one 20-connect/5-min window, and the project itself (playwright.config OI-32-FOLLOW-UP, EXP-009) names the engineer authorizer-exemption as the true fix. ESCALATION QUESTION for architect: may oxo-ws-auth-fn read a per-run, self-cleaning exemption item (narrow scoped dynamodb:GetItem) to bypass the per-IP COUNT for a known server-derived runner IP — accepting the new grant, given it changes nothing for any non-exempt/attacker IP and continues the IMP-008 human-directed exemption decision?
